name: Union School Trnsprtn & Nemt
districts_or_customers: Twin Cities metro / Fridley-area school transport + Medical Assistance (NEMT) clients
recent_news: Union Transportation Service LLC incorporated 2015 in MN at 5670 7th St NE Fridley; operates school routes plus wheelchair-accessible NEMT (MA & private pay).
fit_notes: Very small dual-purpose school + NEMT operator; sub-scale (~$1.2M revenue) for Summit but could be a micro tuck-in for MN density. NEMT mix less core to Summit's school-bus thesis.

name: School Bus Boss LLC
principals: Kyle Carrier (listed as Treasurer; current Director of Transportation at Richland School District 400)
recent_news: Limited public footprint; Kyle Carrier's LinkedIn lists School Bus Boss LLC as past experience while he now serves as Director of Transportation at Richland SD 400, suggesting the LLC may be dormant, a consulting/holding entity, or a very small private operator with no website.
fit_notes: Cannot confirm as an active contract school-bus operator. Principal now works inside a public school district, which raises doubt that the LLC is a going-concern bus contractor. Likely not a viable Summit tuck-in target without further diligence.

name: Joy School Bus Svc
recent_news: No website, no press, no FMCSA/Yelp/Manta hit confirmed at 6201 Westline Dr Ste C, Houston TX 77036. Address is a small SW Houston commercial strip; could be a micro/owner-operator school-bus or shuttle service serving private/charter schools, but identity is unverified.
fit_notes: Insufficient signal to qualify. Houston is a Summit-adjacent market but at ~22 employees / ~$1.2M revenue and no digital footprint, would require direct outreach to validate fleet, contracts, and ownership before any tuck-in consideration.

name: Stahlke Bus Svc
principals: Julie Bernick (prior owner, daughter of founders)
recent_news: Third-generation family operator: founded 1948 by Dwain & Ruth Stahlke; sold to daughter Julie & Mel Bernick in 1982; transitioned to son Jay Bernick 9/1/2014. Fleet ~25 large buses + 4 SPED buses + 2 vans; 70-year anniversary covered by Delano Herald Journal.
fit_notes: Classic Summit tuck-in profile: 75+ year independent family operator in MN with stable Delano/Loretto district contracts, ~31 buses, SPED capability. Recent generational handoff (2014) means succession is not imminent, but family-owned, multi-decade incumbent contract makes it a high-quality watch-list name for MN density.

name: Candlewood Valley Bus Co
districts_or_customers: Historically: Danbury-Bethel Transit District (under HARTransit contract, 1973-1991)
recent_news: Candlewood Valley Bus Co operated the Danbury-Bethel public transit contract from 1973 until HARTransit took the operation in-house in 1991. Whether the company continued as an independent school-bus contractor at 180 Old Brookfield Rd, Danbury is not confirmed in public sources; Danbury Public Schools is now served by Student Transportation of America. The address still pings as an active business location in the dataset.
fit_notes: Likely a residual small operator (charter/private-school work) post-1991 transit handover, if still active at all. Danbury K-12 contract appears to sit with STA, so any remaining Candlewood Valley book is probably charter/private — limited strategic value to Summit unless diligence reveals contract school routes.
